summary: SGF Fang Holdings offers 11 million Diamondback shares at $172.25--$176 each, potentially raising as much as $1.94 billion.

headline: Oil Prices Steady, S&P 500 Dips As Reserve Release Offsets Mine Fears
summary: Oil prices remained in a holding pattern on Wednesday morning as the International Energy Agency announced a record release of petroleum reserves by member countries to avoid a supply crunch.  The S&P 500 fell slightly, despite a strong earnings report fom Oracle.  The IEA said its 32 member nations agreed to jointly release 400 million barrels of oil.

headline: Oil Prices Rise, S&P 500 Futures Fall As Reserve Plans Offset Mine Fears
summary: Oil prices remained in a holding pattern early Wednesday as plans for a joint release of emergency petroleum reserves moved forward offset fears that the Strait of Hormuz could remain closed indefinitely amid concerns that Iranian vessels are laying mines.  S&P 500 futures rose slightly, helped by a strong earnings report from Oracle.  The International Energy Agency has recommended the release of a record 400 million barrels of oil by its 32-member nations, according to The Wall Street Journal.

headline: Is Diamondback’s Large Secondary Share Sale And Insider Selling Altering The Investment Case For FANG?
summary: Diamondback Energy, Inc. recently disclosed a follow-on registration for 11,000,000 common shares tied to an underwritten secondary offering by SGF FANG Holdings, LP, alongside fresh insider sales by senior executives. Although Diamondback will not receive any proceeds from this large shareholder sale, the combination of secondary supply, insider selling, and weaker oil and gas prices has sharpened focus on how ownership changes intersect with sector-wide pressures. We’ll now examine how...

headline: Reported Earlier, Diamondback Energy Prices Secondary Offering Of 11M Shares By SGF FANG Holdings, Raising Approximately $1.9B
summary: Reported Earlier, Diamondback Energy Prices Secondary Offering Of 11M Shares By SGF FANG Holdings, Raising Approximately $1.9B

raw.headline: Reported Earlier, Diamondback Energy Prices Secondary Offering Of 11M Shares By SGF FANG Holdings, Raising Approximately $1.9B

headline: Diamondback Energy Announces Pricing of Secondary Common Stock Offering
summary: MIDLAND, Texas, March 10, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Diamondback Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: FANG) (“Diamondback”) announced today the pricing of an underwritten public offering of 11,000,000 shares of its common stock (the “Secondary Offering”) by SGF FANG Holdings, LP (the “Selling Stockholder”). The gross proceeds from the sale of the shares by the Selling Stockholder will be approximately $1.9 billion. Diamondback will not receive any proceeds from the sale of the shares by the Selling Stockholder.

The gross proceeds from the sale of the shares by the Selling Stockholder will be approximately $1.9 billion. Diamondback will not receive any proceeds from the sale of the shares by the Selling Stockholder.

headline: Diamondback Energy Equity Raise Tests Post Merger Capital Allocation Story
summary: Diamondback Energy filed for an 11 million share follow-on equity offering shortly after closing its merger with Endeavor Energy. The offering comes as the combined company begins to shape its post merger capital structure and funding plans. Shareholders are watching how this new equity issuance may affect ownership, balance sheet flexibility, and future capital allocation. Diamondback Energy (NasdaqGS:FANG) is moving quickly after its Endeavor Energy merger by turning to the equity...
